analytical_depth.rationale: Exceptional unmasking of statutory financials. The adjustments for Ind AS 115 (revenue lag) and Ind AS 23 (capitalized interest to reveal a 1.88x true ICR) show deep institutional understanding.

logical_consistency.rationale: The report establishes the accounting distortion early and consistently applies this lens to explain ROE, CFO, and margin anomalies without ever contradicting itself.

completeness.rationale: Covers almost all bases comprehensively. A minor gap is the lack of a forward delivery schedule (mn sq ft expected to complete in FY26/27) to map exactly when the ₹47k Cr WIP will hit the P&L.

actionability.rationale: The 'Capital Allocation Chain Links' framework is a brilliant summary of where the business is stressed. Clear identification of governance flags (CARO) provides immediate value.

sector_framework.rationale: Flawless application of real estate frameworks. Correctly discards PE/EBITDA in favor of Pre-sales, Collections, Mgmt OCF, RERA escrow constraints, and P/Adj BV.

data_sourcing.rationale: Excellent inline citations and transparent calculations (e.g., showing the exact math for adjusted ICR and equity dilution).

tool_use_discipline.rationale: Highly disciplined execution. Successfully navigated complex tool chains, used the calculator 12 times correctly, and honestly reported missing data (RERA escrow) in the compliance gate.

cost_efficiency.rationale: At 37 turns and $0.95, it is highly inefficient. The log shows the agent executed 10 separate sequential turns just for calculations (Turns 25-34) instead of optimizing its workflow.

issues.issue: The agent took 37 turns, largely because it executed 10 sequential `calculate` tool calls one by one at the end of its run.
issues.suggestion: Update system prompts to instruct the agent to batch calculations or plan its math steps more efficiently to reduce turn count.

issues.section: 6. Balance Sheet and Cash Flow Reality
issues.issue: While the report excellently identifies the ₹47,099 Cr WIP inventory as future revenue, it misses extracting the management's guided delivery schedule (mn sq ft completions for FY26/FY27).
issues.suggestion: Instruct the agent to specifically query `deck_insights` or `concall_insights` for 'delivery guidance' or 'completion schedule' when analyzing real estate developers.

strengths: Masterful handling of real estate accounting quirks (Ind AS 115 and 23), calculating a true adjusted ICR of 1.88x vs the headline 11x.
The 'Capital Allocation Chain Links' summary provides a highly actionable, intuitive framework for understanding the company's cash flow cycle and current stress points.
real_estate.summary: This is an institutional-quality financial deep-dive that perfectly deconstructs the misleading statutory financials of a real estate developer. The analytical depth is superb, though the agent's execution path was highly inefficient due to unbatched sequential calculator calls.
